title: Simple Natural Disasters Mod (SNDM)
description:

body:
🌪️ Simple Natural Disasterss Mod
Simple Natual Disasters Mod (SNDM) adds a fully dynamic, realistic, and destructive natural disasterq to your Minecraft world. Built for Forge 1.20.1, this mod brings one of nature's most powerful forces directly into your game.
Features

5 escalating phases that automatically intensify every 5 minutes
Real block pickup — the hurricane physically rips blocks from the ground and hurls them through the air as falling block entities that land back down
Player pull — the storm drags you toward its eye with increasing force in higher phases
Realistic spiral particle system with a calm eye at the center
Ambient wind sounds that get louder and more intense per phase
Random natural triggering in survival mode — the storm can appear on its own
Full command control to start, stop, and set any phase instantly

Commands

/hurricane start — starts the hurricane at phase 1
/hurricane start phase2 through phase5 — jump straight to any phase
/hurricane stop — stops the hurricane immediately
/hurricane status — shows the current phase and time remaining
/sandstorm
/tornado
/tsunami
/supercell

THE BLOCKS INSIDE THE MOD ARE NOT CRAFTABLE YET.
Requirements

Minecraft 1.20.1
Forge 47.2.0

⚠️ Warning: Phase 5 is extremely demanding on lower end PCs. Start with phase 1 on all disasters!
